Malvern, Arkansas · Now Open

Arkansas's
Largest Outdoor Airsoft Field

Diamond State Airsoft · 101 Acres · Natural Terrain

A brand new outdoor airsoft field built on 101 acres of pure Arkansas terrain — natural hills, a 4.5-mile professional motocross track, creeks, ponds, and dense forest. No structures. Just raw, tactical ground. Bring your gun. We'll see you on the field.

The Field

101 Acres of Pure
Arkansas Battlefield

Diamond State Airsoft is built on the former Diamond MX professional motocross complex in Malvern, Arkansas. We're launching with the raw, natural terrain as-is — and it's already one of the most tactically diverse outdoor airsoft environments in the South-Central United States.

The 4.5-mile motocross track provides natural berms, dramatic elevation changes, and long open sightlines you won't find anywhere else. The surrounding forest, wetlands, ponds, and creek systems create a battlefield that rewards every playstyle — from CQB woodland to long-range open engagement.

4.5-Mile MX Track

Former professional motocross course with berms, jumps, and natural elevation

Natural Hills

Significant elevation changes across the property create multi-level tactical play

Creeks & Ponds

Year-round waterways and ponds break up the terrain and divide zones naturally

Forest & Wetlands

Dense pine forest and wetland areas provide woodland cover and natural obstacles

101 Acres Total

Nearly 6× larger than the next closest airsoft field in Arkansas

Malvern, AR

35 min from Hot Springs · 50 min from Little Rock · 25 min from DeGray Lake

Hours & Schedule

When We're Open

Saturday

9am – 5pm

Public open play. Walk-ins welcome. BYOG required. $20/person all day.

Open to Public

Sunday

9am – 5pm

Public open play. Walk-ins welcome. BYOG required. $20/person all day.

Open to Public

Monday – Friday

By Reservation

Private group bookings only. Minimum 10 players required. Call or text to reserve your date.

Private Only · 10+ Players

Open rain or shine.Arkansas weather won't stop us — and frankly, a muddy battlefield is half the fun. Dress for the conditions and bring plenty of BBs.

Stay Overnight

Play All Weekend.
Sleep On-Site.

Unlike most airsoft fields, Diamond State has full overnight accommodations on the same property. Drive in Friday evening, play Saturday and Sunday, and drive home Sunday night — no hotel needed.

RV Sites

60 powered RV sites with 30/50-amp hookups. Centralized dump stations, water fill, and clean restrooms on-site.

$25–$30/ night

Primitive Camping

20 tent camping spots on the property. Access to shared restrooms, water stations, and dump facilities.

$15/ night

Private Suites

Four fully furnished 1 bed / 1 bath private suites in the main building. Climate-controlled, private bathroom. Perfect for team leads or couples.

$80/ night

Reserve overnight accommodations alongside your field time

What's Coming

We're Just Getting Started.
This Is Phase One.

Diamond State Airsoft is launching with raw, natural terrain. In the coming months we'll be building out permanent field infrastructure and adding services that will make this one of the premier airsoft destinations in the mid-South.

Permanent Field Structures

Bunkers, kill houses, barricades, shipping container props, and dedicated game zones built into the natural terrain.

Phase 2

On-Site Airsoft Shop

Full retail shop with guns, BBs, gear, upgrades, and accessories. Plus rental packages for players who don't own gear yet.

Phase 2

MilSim Events

Partnering with national MilSim organizers including American MilSim, Third Coast Airsoft, and Overwatch Tactics for large-scale tournament events.

Coming 2026

Gear Rentals

Full rental packages — guns, masks, vests, and ammo — for players who want to try airsoft without owning their own equipment.

Phase 2
Field Rules

Know Before You Play

Requirements

  • BYOG is mandatory.Bring your own airsoft gun, BBs, and full protective gear. No exceptions.
  • Eye protection requiredat all times on the field. Full seal goggles or mask strongly recommended.
  • Waivers requiredfor all players before entering the field.
  • Age 13+ to play.Under 18 requires parent or guardian signature on waiver.
  • FPS limits:400 FPS semi-auto, 350 FPS full-auto. Chronograph checks may apply at events.

Field Conduct

  • Call your hits honestly. Honor system is the foundation of the sport.
  • No blind firing, no bunkering, no physical contact with other players.
  • Safe zone is HOT BARREL FREE. Magazines out and caps on in staging areas.
  • Players removed for unsafe or unsportsmanlike behavior without refund.
  • Respect the terrain. This is natural land — no digging, no cutting trees, no littering.
Ready to Play?

Get On The Field
This Weekend.

$20. All day. 101 acres. No reservations required for open play — just show up Saturday or Sunday at 9am with your gear and you're in.
